sorting-direction.label: Sorting Direction (ASC, DESC)
sorting-direction.summary: Control sort order with ASC and DESC keywords.

sketch-asc-desc-intro.title: Sorting with ASC and DESC
sketch-asc-desc-intro.bodyMarkdown:
In SQL, you can control the order of your query results using the `ORDER BY` clause. By default, results are sorted in ascending order (from smallest to largest, or A-Z). You can explicitly use `ASC` for ascending order or `DESC` for descending order (from largest to smallest, or Z-A).

**Example:**

```sql
SELECT name, price FROM products
ORDER BY price ASC;
```

This query lists products from the lowest to highest price.

To reverse the order:

```sql
SELECT name, price FROM products
ORDER BY price DESC;
```

Now, products are listed from the highest to lowest price.

sketch-multi-column-sorting.title: Sorting by Multiple Columns
sketch-multi-column-sorting.bodyMarkdown:
You can sort by more than one column by listing them in the `ORDER BY` clause, separated by commas. Each column can have its own sort direction.

**Example:**

```sql
SELECT name, category, price FROM products
ORDER BY category ASC, price DESC;
```

This query sorts products alphabetically by category, and within each category, it sorts products by price from highest to lowest.

quiz-single-choice-asc-desc.title: Choose the Correct Sorting Direction
quiz-single-choice-asc-desc.prompt: Which keyword would you use to sort products from the highest to lowest price?

help.concept: The DESC keyword is used in SQL to sort results in descending order, from highest to lowest.
help.hint_1: ASC sorts from lowest to highest; DESC does the opposite.
help.hint_2: To see the most expensive products first, use DESC after the column name.

quiz-multi-choice-order-by.title: Identify Valid ORDER BY Clauses
quiz-multi-choice-order-by.prompt: Which of the following are valid ways to sort the products table by price in SQL?
quiz-multi-choice-order-by.hint: Look for correct SQL syntax and valid keywords.

help.concept: ORDER BY is followed by the column name and optionally ASC or DESC. ASC is the default if not specified.
help.hint_1: The column name should come after ORDER BY.
help.hint_2: If you don't specify ASC or DESC, SQL defaults to ASC.

quiz-drag-reorder-sorting.title: Arrange the Query for Descending Price
quiz-drag-reorder-sorting.prompt: Put the parts of this SQL query in the correct order to list product names and prices from highest to lowest price.
quiz-drag-reorder-sorting.hint: Start with SELECT, then FROM, then ORDER BY, then the sorting direction.

help.concept: A basic SQL query structure is SELECT ... FROM ... ORDER BY ... [ASC|the correct answer].
help.hint_1: ORDER BY comes after FROM, and the correct answer follows the column.
help.hint_2: The the correct answer keyword should be at the end, after specifying the column to sort.

quiz-fill-blank-choice-default-sorting.title: Default Sorting Direction
quiz-fill-blank-choice-default-sorting.prompt: Fill in the blank: If you write `ORDER BY price` without specifying ASC or DESC, the results will be sorted in ____ order.
quiz-fill-blank-choice-default-sorting.hint: What is the default order if you don't specify?

help.concept: If you omit ASC or DESC, SQL uses the missing term order by default.
help.hint_1: the missing term means from lowest to highest.
help.hint_2: The default is not descending or random; it's the opposite of DESC.

quiz-fill-blank-choice-default-sorting.template: ORDER BY price sorts results in ____ order by default.

quiz-code-input-multi-column-sorting.title: Sort by Category and Price
quiz-code-input-multi-column-sorting.prompt: Write a SQL query to select the name, category, and price of all products, sorted first by category (A-Z), then by price from highest to lowest within each category.
quiz-code-input-multi-column-sorting.hint: Use ORDER BY with two columns and specify DESC for price.

help.concept: You can sort by multiple columns in SQL by listing them in ORDER BY, each with its own direction.
help.hint_1: First sort by category ascending, then by price descending.
help.hint_2: Remember to separate columns in ORDER BY with a comma and specify DESC for price.
